description_long: This is a dark-colored, single-propeller military-style airplane with a streamlined fuselage and elliptical wings. The wings and tail feature large red circles with white outlines, reminiscent of Japanese World War II aircraft insignia. The propeller at the nose is painted black with yellow tips, and the cockpit is positioned just ahead of the wing root, enclosed with a clear canopy. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with a yellow band near the rear fuselage. The overall design is sleek and aerodynamic, with no visible external armaments or landing gear deployed.
description: A dark, single-propeller military-style airplane with red and white roundels on the wings and tail, featuring a streamlined fuselage and enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from above and behind, highlighting the elliptical wings, tail roundel, and propeller at the front.
description_view_1: This view shows the airplane from above and to the left, emphasizing the cockpit canopy, wing roundels, and propeller details.
description_view_2: The airplane is viewed from the rear left, displaying the tail structure, rear fuselage, and the underside of the wings.
description_view_3: Seen from the rear right, this view focuses on the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the side profile of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight elliptical wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or taildragger configuration based on design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy just ahead of the wing root.
